biological_replicate: each one composed by SG of three ticks
technical_replicate: All samples were analyzed in three technical replicates.
experimental_design: the sialotranscriptomes of unfed and fed ticks were determined
factor_value: compared the sialotranscriptome of unfed A. sculptum ticks and those fed for 72 h
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_biological_replicates: Eight biological replicates (each one composed by RNA extracted from SG of three ticks)
number_of_samples: Eight biological replicates (each one composed by RNA extracted from SG of three ticks)
